Base branch must be `develop` (not `main` — `main` is the protected release branch).
Title format: Conventional Commits — type(scope): summary   e.g. feat(core): add URLRequest.cURL helper
See CONTRIBUTING.md for conventions.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #12 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Base branch is `develop`
- [ ] Title follows Conventional Commits (`type(scope): summary`)
- [ ] `swift build` and `swift test` pass locally
- [ ] One focused concern; SwiftLint clean
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour/public surface changed (`docs/<Module>.md`, `CLAUDE-INTEGRATION.md`, DocC)
